episodes.title: 03 Expanse: The Nannup Four | Down the rabbit hole
episodes.description: Dominique travels across the country to meet the two people who might be able to help her understand how Chantelle came to be living a reclusive life in a hidden corner of Western Australia, alongside a self-styled spiritual guru 18 years her senior. episodes.title: 02 Expanse: The Nannup Four | Selling snake oil
episodes.description: A chance encounter in the streets of Melbourne in 1998 leaves a friend wondering what Chantelle McDougall has been pulled into. Dominique hears about the escalating pattern of control Simon Kadwill exercises over Chantelle. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

episodes.title: 01 Expanse: The Nannup Four | The people in the blue house
episodes.description: When three adults and a child disappear without a trace from the isolated bush community of Nannup in 2007, it sparks disturbing theories about what might have happened. What was going on in the little blue house, and could understanding that hold the key to the disappearance? Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

episodes.title: INTRODUCING — Expanse: The Nannup Four
episodes.description: When four people disappeared from a blue farmhouse on the outskirts of the Western Australian town of Nannup in 2007, they left behind the scatterings of a life, a note pinned to their door and a question: was the disappearance a choice... or murder?
